gbif_genesys_gap.label: GBIF-rich and Genesys-poor vegetable sites
gbif_genesys_gap.description: Vegetable target GBIF records/species are high, while same-cell Genesys PGR accessions are low.

temp_genesys_gap.label: High warming and Genesys-poor vegetable sites
temp_genesys_gap.description: Annual mean temperature change is high, while same-cell Genesys PGR accessions are low.

rain_extreme_genesys_gap.label: Extreme rainfall-change and Genesys-poor vegetable sites
rain_extreme_genesys_gap.description: Absolute annual rainfall change is high, while same-cell Genesys PGR accessions are low.
